headline: Incyte Announces Positive CHMP Opinion for Opzelura® (ruxolitinib) Cream for the Treatment of Adults with Moderate Atopic Dermatitis
summary: MORGES, Switzerland, June 26, 2026--Incyte Announces Positive CHMP Opinion for Opzelura® (ruxolitinib) Cream for the Treatment of Adults with Moderate Atopic Dermatitis

headline: Incyte Announces EMA CHMP Positive Opinion Recommending Approval Of Opzelura Cream For Moderate Atopic Dermatitis; Application Now Referred To European Commission For Final Action
summary: If approved, Opzelura® (ruxolitinib) cream will be the first steroid-free, topical JAK treatment option in the European Union (EU) for adults with moderate atopic dermatitis (AD) for whom standard topical therapies have
